title: Pearl Enters the Fight
description: On pages 6–9, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you stupid? You'll die instead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you want to die so badly...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then I'll kill you nice and flashy!

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: I'd never have imagined even in my dreams that I, iron wall pearl, would be given a double nosebleed in a single fight.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I see now how dangerous you guys are.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Now don't move if you don't want that old man's head to be blown off!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: How dare you tarnish my invincible battle record...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't lay a finger on him, errand boy!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: is held at gunpoint by him.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Gin, you cheap son of a bitch... there's no way I can accept your conditions!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just leave this ship and you can spare everyone's lives!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: All you have to do is leave...

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
